task_description: Call three services sequentially where each service's input depends on the previous service's output. Service A provides a token, Service B uses it to get data, and Service C processes the combined result.

services.name: service-a
services.description: Returns an authentication token to use with subsequent services

services.name: service-b
services.description: Returns enriched data when called with the token from service-a

services.name: service-c
services.description: Returns final aggregated analysis combining data from previous services

input_data.aggregation_instructions: Chain the calls sequentially, passing context from each to the next, and return the final aggregated result.
